name: Strats(SM) Trust For Allstate Corp Securities, Series 2006-3 06-3 ASSET BKD
summary: Strats(SM) Trust For Allstate Corp Securities, Series 2006-3 06-3 ASSET BKD is a unit investment trust that holds securities related to Allstate Corp, distributing income to its unitholders. The trust was formed in 2006 and is managed by a financial institution. It focuses on income from Allstate securities.
